Build an accessible tab panel with keyboard navigation
No ARIA; no keyboard; no tabpanel relationship

function @N@({@items@}){const[s,setS]=useState(0);const refs=useRef([]);const k=e=>{let n=s;if(e.key=="ArrowRight")n=(s+1)%@items@.length;else if(e.key=="ArrowLeft")n=(s-1+@items@.length)%@items@.length;else return;e.preventDefault();setS(n);refs.current[n]?.focus()};return
{@items@.map((t,@i@)=>)}
{@items@.map((t,@i@)=>
{t.content}
)}
}
No ARIA; multiple panels in DOM; no keyboard

function @N@({tabs}){const[a,setA]=useState(tabs[0]?.id);const refs=useRef({});const k=e=>{const i=tabs.findIndex(t=>t.id===a);let n=i;if(e.key=="ArrowRight")n=(i+1)%tabs.length;else if(e.key=="ArrowLeft")n=(i-1+tabs.length)%tabs.length;else return;e.preventDefault();const id=tabs[n].id;setA(id);refs.current[id]?.focus()};return
{tabs.map(t=>)}
{tabs.map(t=>
{t.body}
)}
}
